zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_1: $names$走在狭窄的岩石通道中，四下里一片死寂，只有不知从何处传来的滴水声
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_2: 一阵阴冷的风从洞穴深处吹来，带着一股泥土和未知生物的混合气味，$names$不禁打了个寒颤
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_3: $names$身边的洞壁上，一片片散发着幽蓝色微光的苔藓静静地生长着
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_4: $names$沿着一条地下暗河的边缘前行
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_5: $names$小心翼翼地穿过狭窄的洞穴通道
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_6: 洞内潮湿的空气让$names$感到一丝寒意
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_7: 一块发光的矿石吸引$names$的目光
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_8: 狭窄的缝隙中，$names$侧身挤过，衣服被岩石刮擦
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_9: $names$用绳索固定身体，勇敢地滑下陡峭的岩坡
zh-cn.expedition_cave_exploring_10: $names$涉过浅浅的地下水潭，水流冰凉刺骨

en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_1: $names$ walks through a narrow rocky passage. Silence reigns all around, broken only by the sound of dripping water from somewhere unknown.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_2: A cold, damp wind blows from the depths of the cave, carrying a mix of earth and the scent of unknown creatures. $names$ shivers involuntarily.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_3: On the cave wall beside $names$, patches of moss emitting a faint ghostly blue glow grow silently.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_4: $names$ walks along the edge of an underground river.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_5: $names$ carefully moves through the narrow cave passage.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_6: The damp air inside the cave sends a chill through $names$.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_8: Squeezing sideways through a narrow crack, $names$'s clothes are scraped by the rocks.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_9: Securing the body with a rope, $names$ bravely slides down a steep rocky slope.
en-us.expedition_cave_exploring_10: $names$ wades through a shallow underground pool; the water is bitingly cold.
